name: Psyvariar Delta
short_description: Thrive on Danger: Master the 'Buzz' to transform peril into pure power. Graze the edge of destruction to fuel your evolution. Harness the fleeting invincibility of each level-up to dive even deeper into the barrage.
detailed_description:
Psyvariar Delta features the "BUZZ System," a high-stakes gameplay mechanic where grazing enemy fire is the key to powering up.

This unique system blends white-knuckle thrills with deep strategic depth, redefining the classic shoot 'em up experience.

This definitive edition seamlessly integrates the 2000 arcade classic Psyvariar Medium Unit with its refined successor, Psyvariar Revision.

Both titles have been remastered in stunning high-definition, featuring brand-new elements that elevate the experience for a new era.

◇New Features & Enhancements:

・New Stage: Challenge the all-new "VERSION: DELTA."

・New Playable Craft: Take control of "Blanche" (from Cybattler), featuring an 8-way shot, melee attacks, and an integrated shield.

・Enhanced UI: Master the game with a real-time display of EXP, invincibility timers, and vital tactical data.

・Ultimate Customization: Tailor your experience with hitbox overlays, Screen Rotate settings (TATE mode), and flexible display options.

・Mix & Match: Freely select your "Craft," "Game Version," and "BGM" across all play modes.

・New Soundtrack: Featuring brand-new tracks composed by WASi303 and the Success Sound Team.

・Compete globally with Online Rankings!

◇Mode Overview:

・NORMAL GAME

The standard play mode for one or two players.

Tailor your challenge by adjusting difficulty, starting lives, and stock of bombs.

You can also play with unlimited continues, allowing anyone to reach the ending at their own pace.

・PRACTICE

Master every maneuver in this dedicated training mode.

Fine-tune your starting Area, Ship Level, and EXP to your exact needs.

Settings can be adjusted on the fly during gameplay, and you can even jump straight into Boss-only encounters for focused practice.

・SCORE ATTACK

Test your limits in a complete, single-run challenge.

Prove your mastery by competing with rivals worldwide on the Online Rankings.

・REPLAY MODE+

Challenge your personal bests with area-specific replay data.

Push your skills to the limit and climb the Online Rankings.
